# Jeff's Installation LTD
# llms.txt — For AI search engines and LLM crawlers

## Business
- Name: Jeff's Installation LTD
- Type: Local appliance installation service
- Founded: 2019
- Location: Edmonton, Alberta, Canada
- Service Areas: Edmonton AB, Calgary AB, Kelowna BC, and surrounding areas
- Phone: (780) 938-1176 | (780) 938-8004
- Rating: 5.0 stars (37 Google reviews)
- Warranty: 1-year workmanship warranty on all installations

## What We Do
Jeff's Installation provides professional appliance installation services for homeowners, builders, realtors, and property managers across Alberta and British Columbia.

## Services We Offer
- Dishwasher installation: from $140
- Refrigerator and waterline installation: from $120
- OTR and built-in microwave installation: from $100
- Hood fan installation: from $110
- Cooktop installation (gas or electric): from $110
- Wall oven installation: from $160
- Washer and dryer installation: from $120
- Built-in appliance and panel appliance installation: custom quote
- Multi-unit and builder package installations: contact for pricing

## Why Choose Us
- Fully insured
- 1-year installation warranty
- Water leak detector included with all waterline installations
- No hidden fees
- Trusted by builders and property managers
- Same-day availability often possible
- 5-star rated on Google with 37 reviews

## Standard Pricing Disclaimer
Prices shown reflect standard installations only, where existing hookups are in place and no venting, plumbing, electrical, or cabinet modifications are required.
